sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67367" key="mhkwnoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μηκωνο-ειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n67367.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a poppy</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
